name: Dishita A Thaker
headline: 2026 UC Irvine MBA | Dean's list scholar | Marketing | Product | Analytics & Commercialisation | Beta Gamma Sigma honouree
summary: Second-year STEM MBA at UC Irvine (Paul Merage), Strategy & Marketing concentration. Pre-MBA: business consulting at ZS Associates (pharma, international markets). Passionate about product marketing, brand marketing, GTM, marketing analytics. Recent experience at Mattel (UNO) and SEGA. CliftonStrengths: Strategic, Achiever, Arranger, Discipline, Learner.

positions.title: MBA Project Consultant — GTM and Marketing Strategy
positions.description: Led GTM and growth strategy for gaming titles. Designed community-led initiatives across social media, influencers, experiential activations. Managed campaign planning, budget allocation, ROI analysis. Workstream lead: Social Media, Community Events, Strategic Alliances.

positions.title: MBA Marketing Intern — Global Brand Team, Games
positions.description: Drove GTM strategy for UNO Elite ($13M launch). Led Gen Z growth strategy for UNO. Built business cases for a $40M portfolio (pricing analysis, scenario modeling). Owned KPI tracking & post-launch analysis. Supported UNO Social Clubs experiential activations. Conducted whitespace opportunity analysis for digital gaming expansion of Monster High and Polly Pocket. Presented final recommendations to entire Games division including Global Head of Games.

Workstreams: Field Force Effectiveness, Incentive Compensation, brand management analytics, marketing campaigns, launch opportunity, GTM analytics, Key Driver analytics, Immuno-Oncology forecasting. Mentored 4+ associates.
